args.text: CVE-2026-30117 severity assessed as high (session-fixation flaw in token refresh path, affecting auth-api and session-store). Confirmed per security advisory. Ticket TCK-9902 moved to in-progress.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patch window confirmed
args.body: Patch window confirmed for CVE-2026-30117. auth-api will be deployed to v5.8.4, followed by session-store to v2.2.9. See patch-plan.md for details. Ticket: TCK-9902.

args.text: Both services confirmed patched for CVE-2026-30117: auth-api at v5.8.4, session-store at v2.2.9 (verified via ops_lookup).

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patching complete
args.body: Patching complete for CVE-2026-30117. auth-api verified at v5.8.4, session-store verified at v2.2.9. See patch-verification.md. Ticket: TCK-9902.

args.text: Credential rotation checklist completed for CVE-2026-30117: all active refresh tokens invalidated, signing keys rotated, old keys confirmed rejected.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body: As part of remediation for CVE-2026-30117, we've patched auth-api and session-store and rotated credentials. All staff will need to sign in again. Thanks for your patience.
